name: kiip-study
description: KIIP Study — Korean Immigration Integration Program practice platform (root workspace).

scripts.install-all: cd server && npm ci && cd ../client && npm ci
scripts.install-fresh: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --prefix client && npm run test --prefix server

author: Alex Reznitskii
